comparisons.uniqueness_boundary: Unknown cells are not UNSAT proofs, and one SAT response does not exclude further models in its cell.

result: Changing only the round20 midstate cut from split19 to split18 left all thirty-two cells at the bounded solver frontier.
scope: Controlled post-phase1 cut frontier on the same fresh width20 standard ChaCha20 challenge; not a wider result than retained A184 width40 recovery.
